parameters.query:
SELECT a.id AS application_id, a.role_title, a.status AS app_status,
       c.name AS company_name, c.synthesis AS company_synthesis
FROM application a
LEFT JOIN company c ON a.company_id = c.id
WHERE a.id = $1::uuid

SELECT coalesce(
  (SELECT output_json FROM agent_run
   WHERE application_id = $1::uuid AND agent_name = 'jd_parser'
   ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
  '{}'::jsonb
) AS jd

SELECT coalesce(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) AS resume_entries
FROM (
  SELECT id, category, canonical_text, tags
  FROM master_resume_entry
  ORDER BY priority DESC, category
) t

SELECT long_term_goals, target_role_types
FROM user_profile
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO agent_run (application_id, workflow_name, agent_name, output_json)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'match_and_generate', 'resume_critic', $2::jsonb)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO agent_run (application_id, workflow_name, agent_name, output_json)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'match_and_generate', 'match_scorer', $2::jsonb)
RETURNING id

UPDATE application
SET match_score = $1::int
WHERE id = $2::uuid
RETURNING id, match_score, status

UPDATE application
SET status = 'low_match_waiting'
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, status

UPDATE application
SET status = 'withdrawn'
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, status

INSERT INTO generated_material (application_id, type, content_json, model_used)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'tailored_resume', $2::jsonb, $3)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO material_grounding (material_id, master_entry_id, usage_note)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO generated_material (application_id, type, content_json, model_used)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'cover_letter', $2::jsonb, $3)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO material_grounding (material_id, master_entry_id, usage_note)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO generated_material (application_id, type, content_json, model_used)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'linkedin_message', $2::jsonb, $3)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO generated_material (application_id, type, content_json, model_used)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'skill_gap_report', $2::jsonb, $3)
RETURNING id
SELECT url FROM application WHERE id = $1::uuid
UPDATE generated_material SET pdf_drive_url = $1 WHERE id = $2::uuid RETURNING id
UPDATE generated_material SET pdf_drive_url = $1 WHERE id = $2::uuid RETURNING id

UPDATE application
SET status = 'awaiting_review'
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, status
